title: alsophila australis var. excelsa
intro: Alsophila australis var. excelsa, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyatheaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alsophila australis var. excelsa are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
